OmniScript.description: This is the OS for Client termination that is launched from Begin Facility Termination action on Client Contract record page
OmniScript.name: Client_ContractTermination

omniProcessElements.name: FetchingTheServiceAccounts
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "FetchingTheServiceAccounts", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Client_ContractTermination", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "ContextId" : "%ContextId%", "operation" : "query" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: FiltertheSelectedServiceAccounts
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "FiltertheSelectedServiceAccounts", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Client_ContractTermination", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "serviceAccountList" : "%ServicesSelection:ServiceAccounts%", "operation" : "filter" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

childElements.name: noOfSelectedAccounts
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "noOfSelectedAccounts", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "SUM(%SelectedAccount%)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : "Number", "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: NoServiceAccountSelectedError
Name
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Account Name", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: Selected
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Selected", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "checkLabel" : "Selected", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true }

childElements.name: SelectedAccount
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "SelectedAccount", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "IF(%ServiceAccounts|n:Selected%==false,0,1)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : "Number", "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: ServiceLine
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Service Line", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: TerminationDate
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Client Termination Date", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "dateType" : "string", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "dateFormat" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true, "minDate" : "", "maxDate" : "" }

childElements.name: ServiceAccounts
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "", "allowEdit" : false, "allowNew" : false, "allowDelete" : false, "newLabel" : "New", "editLabel" : "Edit", "deleteLabel" : "Delete", "selectMode" : "Multi", "selectCheckBox" : "Selected", "svgSprite" : "utility", "svgIcon" : "user", "elementName" : "", "valueSvgMap" : [ ], "selectSobject" : "", "sobjectMapping" : [ ], "sumElement" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "mode" : "Table", "maxDisplay" : 4, "allowClear" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: ServicesSelection
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Services Selection", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: ClientTerminationConfirmation
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "TextBlock1", "text" : "

By clicking Save, you will initiate a Facility Term request. Please note that all Facility Terms are subject to review.

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: AccountName
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Account Name", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "%SelectedServiceAccounts|n:accountName%", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : "Text", "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : true }

childElements.name: PncTerminationDate
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Termination Date", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "dateType" : "string", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "dateFormat" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true, "minDate" : "", "maxDate" : "" }

childElements.name: ServiceLineName
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "disOnTplt" : true, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "hideGroupSep" : false, "dataType" : "Text", "mask" : null, "show" : null, "hide" : true, "expression" : "%SelectedServiceAccounts|n:serviceline%", "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "Service Line", "controlWidth" : 12 }

childElements.name: TerminatedBy
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "disOnTplt" : true, "hide" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "show" : null, "controllingField" : { "source" : "", "type" : "", "element" : "" }, "optionSource" : { "source" : "ProviderNetworkContract.Terminated_By__c", "type" : "SObject" }, "options" : [ ], "helpTextPos" : "", "helpText" : "", "help" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "readOnly" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "repeatClone" : false, "repeat" : false, "required" : true, "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "Terminated By", "controlWidth" : 12 }

childElements.name: TerminationTime
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Termination Time", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true, "timeType" : "string", "modelTimeFormat" : "HH:mm:ss.sss'Z'", "timeFormat" : "hh:mm a", "minTime" : "", "maxTime" : "", "timeInterval" : 30 }

childElements.name: TerminationTimeZone
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Termination Time Zone", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "options" : [ ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "SObject", "source" : "ProviderNetworkContract.Client_Termination_Time_Zone__c" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "", "allowEdit" : true, "allowNew" : false, "allowDelete" : false, "newLabel" : "New", "editLabel" : "Edit", "deleteLabel" : "Delete", "selectMode" : "Multi", "selectCheckBox" : "", "svgSprite" : "utility", "svgIcon" : "user", "elementName" : "", "valueSvgMap" : [ ], "selectSobject" : "", "sobjectMapping" : [ ], "sumElement" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "mode" : "Table", "maxDisplay" : 6, "allowClear" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: TerminationDetails
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Termination Details", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Save", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : true, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: UpdatePNCRecords
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "UpdatePNCRecords", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Client_ContractTermination", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "PncList" : "%TerminationDetails:SelectedServiceAccounts%", "operation" : "save" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }
